entries.title: Life Critical Rules
entries.headline: Episode 1 from a safety training system built to survive operations scrutiny.
entries.summary: Representative episode from a serialized safety system built for repeat use, field comprehension, and stakeholder confidence.
entries.mandate: Package mandatory safety guidance into a format crews would actually watch while keeping the language credible for operations and HSE review.
entries.execution: The series combines animated instruction, live footage, and episodic packaging so each rule can stand alone or work as part of a broader training system.
entries.outcome: Organized, watchable, and usable across a real rollout.
